2021

How old are you in 2026 if you were born in 2021?

Your age in 2026
4 or 5 years old

If you were born in 2021, you turn 5 in 2026. Before your birthday you are still 4.

The World in 2021
🌍EventsJanuary 6 Capitol riot; Trump supporters storm Congress (Jan 6) · Biden inaugurated; Harris becomes first female VP (Jan 20) · Tokyo Olympics held with no spectators (Jul 23) · Israel-Gaza conflict kills 250 in 11 days (May) · US withdraws from Afghanistan; Taliban retakes Kabul (Aug 15) · Facebook, Instagram, WhatsApp suffer global outage (Oct 4)
🎵MusicDrivers License – Olivia Rodrigo
🎬FilmSpider-Man: No Way Home
💻TechNFTs exploded in popularity with Beeple's art selling for $69 million
🛒PricesBread $1.70 · Gas $3.01/gal · House $346,900

How old am I if I was born in 2021?

If you were born in 2021, you are 4 years old for most of 2026, turning 5 once your birthday arrives. Your exact age depends on whether your birthday has already passed this year. Someone born on January 1, 2021 turns 5 on January 1, 2026, while someone born on December 31, 2021 only turns 5 on December 31, 2026. Use the age calculator above for your precise age down to the day. People born in 2021 have lived through 5 years of history and belong to the Generation Alpha generation.

What generation was born in 2021?

People born in 2021 belong to the Generation Alpha generation. This generation grew up during a unique period in history and witnessed major changes in technology, culture, and society. Use the calculator above to find your exact chronological age in years, months, weeks, and days.

Frequently asked questions

How old am I if I was born in 2021?

If you were born in 2021, you are 4 or 5 years old in 2026. You turn 5 on your birthday in 2026. Use the age calculator for your exact age to the day.

How many years from 2021 to 2026?

From 2021 to 2026 is 5 years. If your birthday has not yet passed in 2026, you are still 4 years old.

What day of the week was I born in 2021?

The day of the week depends on your specific birth date. Use the age calculator and enter your full date of birth to find out exactly which day of the week you were born.

How many days old am I if I was born in 2021?

Someone born on January 1, 2021 has lived approximately 1826 days as of January 1, 2026. Your exact number of days depends on your birth date. Enter your date of birth in the age calculator for the precise count.

What generation am I if I was born in 2021?

People born in 2021 belong to the Generation Alpha generation. Each generation is shaped by the historical events and cultural trends of their formative years.

Source U.S. Social Security Administration – Life Expectancy Calculator
